"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:L/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H/E:P"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1321", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')"}], "description": "### Impact

Lodash versions 4.0.0 through 4.17.22 are vulnerable to prototype pollution in the `_.unset` and `_.omit` functions. An attacker can pass crafted paths which cause Lodash to delete methods from global prototypes. 

The issue permits deletion of properties but does not allow overwriting their original behavior.  

### Patches

This issue is patched on 4.17.23.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.01535, "percentile": 0.7169}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-01-21T23:01:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-13465"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-01-21T20:16:05Z", "published_at": "2026-01-21T23:01:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/lodash/lodash/security/advisories/GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-13465", "https://github.com/lodash/lodash/commit/edadd452146f7e4bad4ea684e955708931d84d81", "https://cert-portal.siemens.com/productcert/html/ssa-253495.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/lodash/lodash/security-advisories/GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/lodash/lodash", "summary": "Lodash has Prototype Pollution Vulnerability in `_.unset` and `_.omit` functions", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:56:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.17.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "lodash"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, <= 4.17.22"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "lodash.unset"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, <= 4.5.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.17.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "lodash-es"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, <= 4.17.22"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.17.23", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "lodash-amd"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, <= 4.17.22"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Lodash has Prototype Pollution Vulnerability in `_.unset` and `_.omit` functions
